rationale: Guidance specifies concrete API integration requirements (Stripe API v3), adds acceptance criteria for success cases and error scenarios with retry logic (3 retries, exponential backoff 1s-4s), webhook signature verification using HMAC-SHA256, and PCI DSS compliance requirement. Performance targets <3 seconds for payment processing, <5 seconds for webhook processing. Token reduction from condensing verbose descriptions into structured requirements with specific technical details.
